sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114883" key="xrusoke/falos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσο-κέφᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n114883.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with golden head,</tr_> epith. of a fish, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0496.tlg001:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
